h2h.note: Mumbai holds a slight historical edge, but Rajasthan's current unbeaten momentum and home advantage in Guwahati could level the playing field.

RR.trend: Flying high with an unbeaten start, RR's revamped squad under Riyan Parag is clicking perfectly, especially after defending tightly in nervy finishes.

MI.trend: Looking to bounce back from a tricky chase loss to DC, MI's balance will be heavily boosted by the expected return of their captain.

squad_news: Hardik Pandya is expected to return for Mumbai Indians after missing their previous match against Delhi Capitals (ESPNcricinfo).
Rajasthan Royals are unlikely to tinker with their winning combination after a narrow six-run victory over GT, with Vaibhav Sooryavanshi continuing to draw attention at the top of the order.

key_matchups.insight: The headline clash features the young sensation Sooryavanshi taking on the veteran Bumrah in the powerplay, a true trial by fire that could dictate RR's start.
Suryakumar's ability to manipulate spin in the middle overs will be heavily challenged by Bishnoi, who is coming off a match-winning defensive spell against GT.

tactical_edge: RR holds the slight tactical edge due to their superior spin attack and current winning momentum, though MI's returning captain could shift the balance in the middle overs.

preview_links.title: Sooryavanshi meets Bumrah as RR eye top of the table
